phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: W-empowered last hits and short Q trades — your passive ignores minion block, so fish through the wave freely.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: Q-W trade pattern live: dash through, bleed, walk out through the wave nobody else can walk through.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: E online — the troll pole changes everything: you now dodge one full rotation per fight and they know it.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Q-W-E strings on his cooldown gaps — never hop first; the pole is your dodge before it's your damage.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Chum the Waters online — the shark plus full string deletes most mids from 70%. The lane is now a horror film.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: First item spike: the string one-shots squishies who eat the shark. Fish aggressively.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Fizz erases one carry per fight: shark the entry, string the target, pole the response, swim away.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: W-empowered last hits and short Q trades — your passive ignores minion block, so fish through the wave freely.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: Slight deficit at level 2: Ahri's charm-orb pick threat edge out your trickster-dodge burst on the margins. You can still trade — just let him start the exchanges and answer on your terms.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: At level 3 the numbers lean his way — the charm-orb pick threat out-tick your trickster-dodge burst in even exchanges. Don't bleed for pride; take the trades his cooldowns hand you.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Slight deficit through levels 4-5: Ahri's charm-orb pick threat edge out your trickster-dodge burst on the margins. You can still trade — just let him start the exchanges and answer on your terms.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: At the level-6 breakpoint your trickster-dodge burst beat the charm-orb pick threat in a straight exchange. Play the front foot — make Ahri answer you, not the other way around.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Slight edge on first item: your trickster-dodge burst beat Ahri's charm-orb pick threat on the margins. Take the short trades you start — just don't force a coin-flip all-in off a small lead.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Fizz erases one carry per fight: shark the entry, string the target, pole the response, swim away.
